svg.title: Ground and first-excited wave functions and their probability densities
svg.desc: Left: the first two eigenfunctions, the ground state with no interior node and the first excited state with one node at the centre. Right: their probability densities; the ground state has a single central peak, the first excited state two peaks and a node at L/2. Legends sit in a band beneath the panels. The ground state has no nodes yet nonzero energy.

text.tspan: has no interior node, yet its energy E
